accuracy_202_pairs.basis: SMT-based verification on 202 function pairs (52 core + 150 scaled)
accuracy_202_pairs.methodology: Each pair encoded via σ-bridge into QF_BV constraints, solved with Z3
limitations: Loop analysis is bounded model checking (BMC) at K=32, not full verification
Memory/string categories achieve 0% due to pointer exclusion from fragment
Error handling (50%) limited by lack of interprocedural analysis

expanded_benchmark.basis: 130 new pairs added covering struct, enum, float, C2Rust, iterator, cast, compound, control_flow
expanded_benchmark.methodology: Hand-written pairs with known expected results

differential_testing_comparison.basis: Random testing with 10,000 inputs per pair on 52 core pairs
differential_testing_comparison.methodology: Cannot detect 8 UB-related divergences by construction

cegar_convergence.basis: CEGAR loop with GPT-4.1-nano, 5 iterations each
cegar_convergence.methodology: Converges only when LLM produces correct translation on first attempt

includes: Integer arithmetic (i8-i64, u8-u64) with overflow semantics
Bitwise operations (AND, OR, XOR, NOT, SHL, SHR)
Control flow (if/else, bounded loops via BMC at K=32, switch/match)
Type casts (widening, narrowing, sign change, float conversion)
Struct types (field access, construction, nested structs)
Enum/tagged union types (discriminant extraction, variant construction)
excludes: Pointers and heap allocation (requires separation logic)

honest_scoping.loop_analysis: Bounded model checking (BMC) at depth K=32, NOT full verification. Exact for bounded loops, best-effort for unbounded.
honest_scoping.struct_encoding: Flat bitvector concatenation — correct for value semantics, does not model pointer-to-struct or heap-allocated structs
honest_scoping.enum_encoding: Tagged bitvector union — correct for discriminant + payload, does not model enum layout optimizations (niche filling)
honest_scoping.float_encoding: IEEE 754 via Z3 QF_FP — correct for standard operations, does not model platform-specific behavior or -ffast-math

conditional_soundness.statement: For functions in F: UNSAT ⟹ ∀x∈D_¬UB. f_C(x) = f_R(x)
conditions: Functions must be in supported fragment F
Loops must have ≤ K iterations for exact results

counterexample_correctness.statement: SAT with model x₀ ⟹ either output divergence or C UB

decidability.statement: For F, the verification problem is decidable (QF_BV + BMC)
